topic: The Complete Guide to Documenting, Prompting, and Protecting Your AI Interactions — IP, Security, and Prompt Ops
content_preview: Comprehensive guide covering AI interaction IP law (Copyright Office Part 2 Report: prompts don't make users authors of output), platform training policies (all consumer tiers train by default since 2025), archival tools (ChatGPT Exporter, Langfuse, PromptLayer), context engineering evolution (Karpathy: LLM as CPU, context window as RAM), prompt anti-patterns (10 documented mistakes), enterprise data leak statistics (Cyera 2026: AI chats now #1 leak cause), regulatory stack (ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act with €35M penalties), prompt ops CI/CD (Promptfoo, 300K+ users), and platform lock-in analysis (ChatGPT Memory vs Claude Memory).
